_comment: Copy this file to .gdrive-credentials.json (gitignored) and replace all placeholder values with the real JSON key downloaded from GCP Service Account page.
_setup_instructions: 1. Create GCP project and enable Google Drive API (https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/library/drive.googleapis.com)
2. Go to IAM -> Service Accounts -> Create Service Account (e.g. lqd-backup)
3. Keys tab -> Add Key -> JSON -> download the file
4. Create a folder on Google Drive, right-click -> Share -> add the service account client_email with role Editor
5. Copy the folder ID from the URL (https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/<FOLDER_ID>)
6. Place the downloaded JSON at scripts/.gdrive-credentials.json (gitignored)
